title: COP 3514 – Program Design
text: 3/29/26, 12.19 AM COP 3514 - Program Design - University of South Florida COP 3514 Program Design Credit(s): 3 The class extends students' programming knowledge by systematically considering the concepts involved in program design and creation. Students will also build upon their previous programming experience by learning to use the C programming language in a networked environment. Prerequisite(s): CQP 2510 (min grade B) AND MAC 2281 (min grade B) Restriction(s): Consent of Instructor or Department Majors Only Permit Required https Ilcatalog usf edulpreview course_nopop php?catoid-23&coid-103465&print 1/1
